notes: (1) 画質 panel now opens CENTERED (user: it was biased to the right). It was anchored to the chip at the row's right end; now it drops as a horizontally-centred card under the row (chip just lights up, no corner-fusing). (2) Camera-animation (🎞) is now shown on phones too. At ~390px the top row stays one line (🏠/🎞/⏺/📱 + 🖥 badge ≈ 384px); on narrow phones (≤384px, e.g. iPhone SE/mini) the row spans full-width and wraps to a tidy 2 lines instead of clipping. (3)(4) Offline save on phones is unchanged BY DESIGN: phones keep saving URL-streamed scenes as a reference (not embedded), because embedding a 357MB scene crashed the tab before; PC/iPad embed the full data. (User confirmed keep-as-is.) Builds on v0.0.21.
